behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file src/bun.js/test/expect.zig, the three targets, the wrapper function Bun__JSWrappingFunction__create, JSPropertyIterator, applyCustomMatcher, and read-only method list used in tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (safe setter handling index keys, avoid bare .put()) without naming putMayBeIndex.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests allow any non-readonly, non-put method name as setter (test_index_safe_property_setting uses a whitelist exclusion), and also accept alternate approaches like initFast or isIndex/parseIndex guards.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run bun test subprocess and bun --eval to exercise actual runtime behavior in addition to source inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: Behavioral tests require the runtime to not crash when registering numeric-key matcher, which a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three targets, safe setter requirement, no bare put, preservation of JSPropertyIterator/wrapping/applyCustomMatcher.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by comment headers (Behavioral fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived) with descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the relevant file but not the exact line or replacement method; localization guidance is appropriate.
